description: Chronological production logs for payment-service covering one hour of Black Friday ramp. Story progresses from healthy INFO traffic to WARN signals (slow SQL, pool pressure), then ERROR storms (timeouts, retry exhaustion, circuit breaker OPEN, Kafka publish failures, and full Postgres connection pool exhaustion).
story_arc: 13:13-13:24 traffic ramp; elevated pool usage and slow queries
13:25-13:39 sustained surge; retries, timeouts, early circuit-breaker warnings
13:40-13:52 pool pressure; retry exhaustion, Kafka failures, thread saturation
13:53-14:00 degradation; DB pool exhausted, SLO breach, widespread payment failures
